run run-abc-123
tenant=tenant-a user=user-a session=session-a
source: events.synthesised

[task    ] task-foreground-1 (foreground)
[tool    ] echo_tool [ok] (12ms)
[tool    ] search_tool [pending]
  +- [approval] search_tool (reason=tagged)
  +- [auth    ] wave11-stub (scope=user)
  +- [pause   ] approval_required (token-xyz)
[finish  ] goal
